segments.text: Looks like Yoshidora was limiting their landing options.
segments.original_text: Yoshidora選手の着地点を少なくしていたようにも見えます

segments.text: Fair's in the mix too, and now even the platform's risky.
segments.original_text: 今度は空中前も一役買って台の上にもリスクがつきます
チャージショットを溜めろ

full_text: Looks like Yoshidora was limiting their landing options. Fair's in the mix too, and now even the platform's risky. Charge it up!
